questions.question: Describe the differences between the ARIMA(1,1,1) and ARIMA(1,1,0) models. What are the implications of the specified values for p, d, and q in each model?
questions.hint: ARIMA(1,1,0) is an MA(1) model, while ARIMA(1,1,1) is an ARMA(1,1) model

questions.question: Write down the three explicit forms for the ARIMA(2,1,1) model. Explain the impact of the specified values for p, d, q, and the differencing term in each case.
questions.hint: ARIMA(2,1,1) can be expressed as ARIMA(p,d,q) or ARIMA(p,d,q) or ARIMA(p,d,q)

questions.question: Derive the ARIMA(1,1,2) model using the three explicit forms. Explain the implications of the specified values for p, d, and q in the final model.
questions.hint: Use ARIMA(p,d,q) = φ1L + θ1ε1 + φ2L^2 + θ2ε2 + φ3L^3 + θ3ε3
